name: normal with near-zero sigma
rationale: Kernel should remain numerically stable when normal CDF transitions are very steep (small sigma).

name: gamma shape near exponential boundary
rationale: Shape parameter near 1.0 probes boundary-like behavior where AD/KS kernels can drift if tails are mishandled.

name: weibull_min near-threshold support with high shape
rationale: High-shape Weibull around loc boundary checks precision of shifted CDF normalization and clamping.

name: lognorm tiny sigma around offset
rationale: Small-sigma lognormal with non-zero location exercises steep CDF region without reconstructing kernels each call.
